raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks only to look at the paragraph, making sentence- and paragraph-level readability the central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid inferring stronger responsibilities such as novelty verification or citation audit from a vague request.","RX.3":"The projection should stay within responsibility assignment and not perform review, editing, or critique of the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid endorsing potentially unsupported scientific or methodological claims as true.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's visible research-writing features."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks only to look at the paragraph, making sentence- and paragraph-level readability the central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid inferring stronger responsibilities such as novelty verification or citation audit from a vague request.
rationale.RX.3: The projection should stay within responsibility assignment and not perform review, editing, or critique of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid endorsing potentially unsupported scientific or methodological claims as true.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact's visible research-writing features.
